surface: Private Milestone 1 scaffold only: data-only Lynx renderer configuration, a DOM-free universal compiler ABI facade, explicit dual-thread compile metadata through a pinned Rspeedy integration, renderer-local type declarations for the first ten planned native tags, custom-element augmentation, and honest root/platform/testing availability metadata. No native root or host driver is implemented.
divergences: The package adapts an audited @lynx-js/types@4.0.0 props/events slice into renderer-owned module declarations because the upstream events entry transitively loads global Element/JSX augmentation.
Root, platform, and testing runtime APIs are absent instead of being represented by throwing or inert compatibility stubs.
ssr: Unsupported. Lynx first-screen adoption is a native runtime protocol, not HTML SSR or Octane hydration.
notes: Milestone 0 remains blocked on public lifecycle/event hooks and the Android/iOS engine matrix; this private scaffold is not a technical preview.
The background root/PAPI host is deferred to Milestone 2, platform capabilities to Milestone 4, and production testing/.lynx.bundle integration to Milestone 5.
